events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1027. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 45–65 g/meal. Prefers Vietnamese; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Fresh Spring Rolls with Chicken
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 41 g outside 45–65 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 45–65 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/800 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/800 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/800 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1027 added to route R-EXCE-1 (Excelsior), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1027: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
